top_signals.title: Big Tech crash, oil volatility rattles markets: Will Bitcoin hold above $60K?
top_signals.summary: With $1.9 billion exiting the spot Bitcoin ETFs and tech stocks under pressure, BTC is failing as a hedge and at risk of falling below the $60,000 support.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Scaffolding Company’s Data-Center Pivot Cuts Into Margins
top_signals.summary: Brand Industrial Services Inc., a scaffolding and industrial services company that does business as BrandSafway, reported sharply lower first-quarter earnings as higher costs and spending on its push into data center construction weighed on results, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Coinbase launches tool to let AI agents manage trading and payments
top_signals.summary: Coinbase is betting that AI agents will become the primary interface for people's financial activity.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
